title: sabina pachyphlaea
intro: Sabina pachyphlaea, also known as Savin or Juniperus sabina, is a type of coniferous tree native to mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Sabina pachyphlaea include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Sabina pachyphlaea include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps.
